Canonical literature entry. Activated hexameric resistosome 9FP6 (Sci Adv 2024, PMID 39504373); resting homodimer 8RFH (PLoS Biol 2024, PMID 39423240). Benchmark equivalents per Dan's call: nbnrc2a and nrc2.
Cell 2026; constitutively active WAI3GOF LRR-domain gain-of-function mutant; octameric resistosome; distinctive channel architecture from divergent CC configuration lacking EDVID motif

Same Cell 2026 paper as WAI3; abstract reports RPS2 also forms an octamer, indicating conserved CCG10-CNL octameric architecture across monocots and dicots. No separate RPS2-only PDB deposit surfaced in NCBI elink for the source PMID — likely grouped under WAI3 deposits or not yet released; flagged as judgement call.

EMBO J 2025; cryo-EM resolved MLA13-AVRA13 as a 1:1 heterodimer purified in planta; authors note this contrasts with pentameric CNL resistosomes. Per rubric judgement call: absence of resistosome in this purification is not evidence of native monomeric state; known_state left unknown.
